description: LOTTE Innovate is a Korean IT and digital transformation company offering cloud, AI, platform, and enterprise development solutions. Its public site also hosts Chamomile, an in-house enterprise application development framework and tooling community.
summary: lotteinnovate.com exposes a developer-facing Chamomile framework download surface on a subdomain, with downloadable IDE/batch bundles gated by a Chamomile-issued license request process; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or MCP connect endpoint on lotteinnovate.com was found.
